ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "protocol_version" INTEGER /* Version of the experiment protocol */,
  "trial_structure" TEXT /* Structure of trials within the experiment */,
  "randomization_method" TEXT /* Method used for randomizing trials or conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "informed_consent" INTEGER /* Informed consent status */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment conducted during the session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant involved in the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date when the session took place */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session in which the trial took place */,
  "choice" INTEGER /* Choice made by the participant */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the participant's choice */,
  "solution" INTEGER /* Solution to the trial */,
  "reward" INTEGER /* Reward given for the trial */,
  "cumulative_reward" INTEGER /* Cumulative reward up to that trial */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time for the participant's choice */,
  "total_trial_time" REAL /* Total time for the trial */,
  "inter_trial_interval" REAL /* Inter-trial interval */,
  "contextual_pressure_with_slow_fast" INTEGER /* Contextual pressure with slow/fast cues */,
  "observations_contextual_pressure_with_slow_fast" INTEGER /* Observations on contextual pressure */,
  "high_value_cue" INTEGER /* Presence of a high-value cue */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus presented */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response required */,
  "time_limit" REAL /* Time limit for the response */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_reward FOREIGN KEY ("reward") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of reward */,
  "reward_value" INTEGER /* Value of the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_condition" TEXT /* Conditions under which the reward is given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the protocol is for */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "version_history" TEXT /* Changes made between protocol versions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protocols_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Affiliated institution */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial the annotation is for */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_category" TEXT /* Category of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cues" (
  "cue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of high-value cue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the high-value cue */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Associated value of the high-value cue */,
  "cue_category" TEXT /* Category of the high-value cue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_cues" (
  "trial_cue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a trial and a cue */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial */,
  "cue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the high-value cue presented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_cue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_cues_cue_id FOREIGN KEY ("cue_id") REFERENCES cues ("cue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_cues_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
